name: Potential Carbon Activity
notes: This rule detects Carbon activity which communicates with the C&C server to exfiltrate data.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon File Names, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Service Name
TD_list: APPLY Potential Carbon Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon File Names, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Service Name
RED_list: Event description: Detects Carbon activity which communicates with the C&C server to exfiltrate data.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
